TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking B1 The C103 Administration Experiment in the World of 1980.
changeReason: "Dose Experiment" changed to "Administration Experiment" — 投与 specifically means medical administration/dosing, and "administration" more accurately conveys it as a deliberate clinical procedure rather than a simple dosage test.

TextENGNew:
C1 Research Proceeding Smoothly in the World of the Furude Family
B5 The Second 'Specimen' in the World of 1980
...After viewing the above fragments, this one will become available.
changeReason: "Sample" changed to "Specimen" — 検体 (kentai) means specimen, not sample; these are different scientific terms with distinct implications about what is being studied.

TextENGNew:
And—
B2 H170 in the World of 1980
B6 The Shirakawa Park Fall Accident in the World of 1980
...These fragments are also connected to its appearance.
changeReason: "An Accident at the Shirakawa Park" changed to "The Shirakawa Park Fall Accident" — the addition of "Fall" (転落) specifies the type of accident, which is meaningful context about the nature of the event.
